title: Harry and Meghan arrive in Australia for four-day tour
description: It is the couple's first visit to Australia since 2018 when they were working royals.

title: With Algeria Visit, Pope Leo Returns to His Augustinian Roots
description: Some theologians say the pontiff’s understanding of Augustine’s teachings helped inform his response to President Trump’s negative comments about him.

title: Why the Vatican and the White House Are on the Outs - The Free Press

title: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney secures a majority government with special election wins
description: Canada's Liberal Party could stay in power until 2029 after Monday’s results.
